headline: Berkshire Hathaway Is Loading Up on These 4 Stocks. Here’s Why
summary: Berkshire Hathaway rarely adds to a position unless management sees meaningful upside ahead, which is why investors tend to closely watch every move the conglomerate makes. Recent filings show Berkshire increasing positions in the New York Times, Chevron, Chubb, and Domino’s Pizza, signaling growing conviction in four very different businesses across media, energy, insurance, and ... Berkshire Hathaway Is Loading Up on These 4 Stocks. Here’s Why

headline: Should Investors Be Drawn to the Cheap Valuation of Darden Stock?
summary: DRI trades at a discount with steady comps growth and solid traffic, but margin pressure and macro uncertainty temper its near-term upside.

headline: Starbucks upgraded at Jefferies on improved turnaround visibility
summary: Investing.com -- Jefferies upgraded Starbucks Corp. to Hold from Underperform on Monday, citing reduced international exposure following the completion of a China joint venture deal and early signs of stabilization in the company’s core U.S. business.
